failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT 
    p.id AS profile_id, 
    p.username, 
    COUNT(c.id) AS comment_count
FROM profile p
JOIN publication pub ON p.id = pub.profile_id
JOIN comment c ON pub.id = c.publication_id
WHERE p.biography ILIKE '%steakhouse%' 
   OR p.biography ILIKE '%churrascaria%'
   OR p.full_name ILIKE '%steakhouse%'
   OR p.full_name ILIKE '%churrascaria%'
   AND (p.biography ILIKE '%Curitiba%' OR p.full_name ILIKE '%Curitiba%')
GROUP BY p.id, p.username
ORDER BY comment_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS profile_id,
  p.username,
  COUNT(c.id) AS comment_count
FROM profile p
JOIN publication pub ON p.id = pub.profile_id
JOIN comment c ON pub.id = c.publication_id
WHERE
  (
    p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'steakhouse | churrascaria')
    OR p.full_name ILIKE '%steakhouse%'
    OR p.full_name ILIKE '%churrascaria%'
  )
  AND (
    p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'curitiba')
    OR p.full_name ILIKE '%Curitiba%'
  )
GROUP BY
  p.id,
  p.username
ORDER BY
  comment_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
  p.id AS profile_id,
  p.username,
  COUNT(c.id) AS comment_count
FROM profile p
JOIN publication pub ON p.id = pub.profile_id
JOIN comment c ON pub.id = c.publication_id
WHERE
  (
    p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('portuguese', 'steakhouse | churrascaria')
